sources.notes: IMD Common Alerting Protocol (CAP) RSS feed. Heavy rain, thunderstorms, lightning, heat/cold waves for all Indian subdivisions.
USGS FDSN event query filtered to India bounding box (6-36N, 68-98E). Returns GeoJSON with magnitude, depth, location. No API key required.
MODIS 1km active fire detections for South Asia (includes India). CSV with lat/lon, brightness, FRP, confidence. Updated every satellite overpass (~6x daily).
VIIRS NOAA-20 375m active fire detections for South Asia. Higher resolution than MODIS (375m vs 1km). Public CSV.

CWC Flood Forecasting portal. ffs.india-water.gov.in and aff.india-water.gov.in confirmed unreachable (DNS/transport errors). inf.cwc.gov.in returns 401 (requires auth). CWC flood warnings were severely impacted in June 2026 monsoon. NWDP CKAN (nwdp.nwic.gov.in) is the primary working alternative — serves CWC telemetry river water level data as CSV via CKAN API. Also see in-nwdp-cwc-river-level for direct data access.

CKAN API listing 532+ water datasets from CWC, CGWB, CPCB. Use package_show?id={name} for resource URLs. CWC river water level telemetry data updated through May 30, 2026. All datasets available as CSV download via CKAN resource API. No API key required.

CKAN package_show for CWC river water level telemetry data (hourly). Returns JSON with 58 resources covering all river basins — Subernarekha, Brahmani, Mahanadi, Godavari, Krishna, Pennar, Cauvery, Tapi, Narmada, Mahi, Sabarmati, West/East flowing rivers, Yamuna. Data periods: 2021-2025 and 2026-2030 CSVs. Replace the NWDP FFS portal for real-time water levels.
Real-time AQI from CPCB stations nationwide. PM2.5, PM10, NO2, SO2, CO, O3, NH3. Free API key from data.gov.in.

sources.authority: INCOIS (Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services)
sources.notes: INCOIS main site works. Key sub-services: (1) Ocean State Forecast at /site/services/osf.jsp — 5-10 day wave/wind/current/SST forecasts. (2) RSMC NetCDF data download at /oceanservices/rsmc_download.jsp — daily WW3 wave and HYCOM current NetCDF via THREDDS at /thredds/catalog.html. (3) Location-specific forecasts at /site/services/LSFImages.jsp — GIF images for fish landing centres. (4) Port/harbour forecasts at sarat.incois.gov.in/OSF/. (5) ESSDP data portal at /essdp/ — 1,047 MoES datasets. Subdomains tsunami.incois.gov.in, erddap.incois.gov.in, las.incois.gov.in, io50.incois.gov.in are unreachable.
